## Structural Annotation (SIRIUS)

```{python}
sirius = context.get("sirius", {})
if not sirius:
    emit_markdown("> TODO: Populate 'sirius' in the context file to surface annotation results.")
else:
    files = sirius.get("files", [])
    if files:
        emit_markdown("Key outputs:")
        for item in files:
            label = item.get("label", item.get("path", "Output"))
            path = item.get("path")
            if path:
                emit_markdown(f"- {label}: {link_label(path, label)}")

    top_hits = sirius.get("top_annotations", [])
    if top_hits:
        emit_markdown("### Top Candidate Structures")
        lines = [
            "| Feature | Candidate | Score | Formula | Class |",
            "| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |",
        ]
        for hit in top_hits:
            feature = hit.get("feature_id", "")
            name = hit.get("compound", "")
            score = hit.get("score")
            score = f"{score:.2f}" if isinstance(score, (float, int)) else (score or "")
            formula = hit.get("formula", "")
            chem_class = hit.get("class", "")
            lines.append(f"| {feature} | {name} | {score} | {formula} | {chem_class} |")
        emit_markdown("\n".join(lines))

    canopus = sirius.get("class_distribution")
    if canopus:
        emit_markdown("### CANOPUS Class Distribution")
        lines = [
            "| Class | Count |", "| --- | --- |"
        ]
        for row in canopus:
            lines.append(f"| {row.get('class', '')} | {row.get('count', '')} |")
        emit_markdown("\n".join(lines))
```
